creator: george@m5p.com
text: I've discovered how to avoid this crash (at least the last 20-30 times I have booted up): boot into single user mode, type <ENTER> to run /bin/sh, type "kldload amdgpu," and then (key step!) wait at least five seconds before typing ctrl-D to exit single user mode.  Since I don't know why this helps, I guess it falls into the voodoo category, but maybe it's a clue.
